mapper.insert: insert into user_progress ( user_id, game_type, level_num, source, updated_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{gameType, jdbcType=INTEGER, typeHandler=com.sniper.game.wordgame.typehandler.GameTypeEnumTypeHandler}, #{levelNum}, #{source, jdbcType=INTEGER, typeHandler=com.sniper.game.wordgame.typehandler.SourceEnumTypeHandler}, now() )
mapper.select: SELECT rn.rank_num AS `rank`, rn.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, rn.level_num AS levelNum, 0 AS isMe FROM ( SELECT up.user_id, up.level_num, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT up2.level_num) FROM user_progress up2 WHERE up2.game_type = up.game_type AND up2.level_num > up.level_num) + 1 AS rank_num FROM user_progress up WHERE up.game_type = #{gameType, jdbcType=INTEGER, typeHandler=com.sniper.game.wordgame.typehandler.GameTypeEnumTypeHandler} ) rn JOIN `user` u ON u.id = rn.user_id ORDER BY rn.rank_num, rn.user_id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT up2.level_num) FROM user_progress up2 WHERE up2.game_type = up.game_type AND up2.level_num > up.level_num) + 1 AS `rank`, up.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, up.level_num AS levelNum, 1 AS isMe FROM user_progress up JOIN `user` u ON u.id = up.user_id WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} AND up.game_type = #{gameType, jdbcType=INTEGER, typeHandler=com.sniper.game.wordgame.typehandler.GameTypeEnumTypeHandler} LIMIT 1
